patch:
@@ -4,8 +4,8 @@
   "description": "Physics system for A-Frame VR, built on Cannon.js",
   "main": "index.js",
   "scripts": {
-    "dev": "budo index.js:dist/aframe-physics-system.js -d examples --port 8000",
-    "dist": "browserify index.js -o dist/aframe-physics-system.js && uglifyjs -c -o dist/aframe-physics-system.min.js -- dist/aframe-physics-system.js",
+    "dev": "budo index.js:dist/aframe-physics-system.js -d examples --port 8000 -- -g browserify-shim",
+    "dist": "browserify -g browserify-shim index.js -o dist/aframe-physics-system.js && uglifyjs -c -o dist/aframe-physics-system.min.js -- dist/aframe-physics-system.js",
     "test": "karma start ./tests/karma.conf.js",
     "test:once": "karma start ./tests/karma.conf.js --single-run",
     "test:firefox": "karma start ./tests/karma.conf.js --browsers Firefox",
@@ -16,6 +16,9 @@
     "version": "npm run preversion:readme && npm run dist && git add -A dist README.md",
     "postversion": "git push && git push --tags && npm publish"
   },
+  "browserify-shim": {
+    "three": "global:THREE"
+  },
   "repository": {
     "type": "git",
     "url": "git+https://github.com/donmccurdy/aframe-physics-system.git"

     "webworkify": "^1.4.0"
   },
   "peerDependencies": {

     "aframe": "^1.0.4",
     "browserify": "^16.5.1",
     "browserify-css": "^0.15.0",
+    "browserify-shim": "^3.8.14",

     "chai": "^3.5.0",
     "chai-shallow-deep-equal": "^1.4.6",
@@ -67,6 +71,7 @@
